name: Hot-rolled steel sheet/coil
components: Body-in-white, floor pan, subframes, side impact beams, structural reinforcements
notes: BF-BOF and EAF routes. BMW sources from multiple mills.

name: Cold-rolled steel sheet
components: Door skins, closures, fender structures
notes: Higher processing energy than hot-rolled.

name: Galvanized steel sheet
components: Underbody panels, wheel wells, rocker panels
notes: Zinc coating adds ~0.2-0.4 vs uncoated.

name: AHSS/UHSS steel
components: B-pillar reinforcement, crash rails, bumper beams, door intrusion beams
notes: Press-hardened boron steels. ArcelorMittal publishes facility EPDs.

name: Steel forgings
components: Steering knuckles, control arm brackets, drive shaft components
notes: Forging adds significant energy.

name: Cast iron components
components: Brake rotors (4), differential housing
notes: Gray/ductile iron. No engine block in EV.

name: Steel tubes/pipes
components: Coolant lines, brake lines, structural tubes
notes: Seamless and welded.

name: Stainless steel
components: Trim accents, select fasteners, heat shields
notes: Less stainless than ICE (no exhaust system).

name: Steel fasteners
components: Bolts, nuts, screws, clips, rivets (~3000+ fasteners)
notes: Heat-treated, plated.

name: Steel wire/springs
components: Coil springs (or air spring steel), seat springs, clips
notes: Spring steel, specific alloy.

name: Aluminum castings
components: Motor housings, inverter housing, suspension arms, wheel carriers (80% secondary Al), subframe nodes
notes: Largest CO2 contributor. Primary vs secondary Al is decisive. BMW uses ~30% secondary.

name: Aluminum extrusions
components: Crash management system, side sills, roof rails, battery tray frame rails
notes: 6xxx series alloys. BMW uses renewable energy Al from select smelters.

name: Aluminum sheet/plate
components: Hood, roof outer skin (40% secondary Al per BMW), door panels, battery enclosure panels
notes: BMW specifically reports 40% secondary Al for roof. Novelis publishes EPDs.

name: Cast aluminum wheels
components: 4x alloy wheels (20-22 inch) — iX uses large wheels
notes: ~12 kg each. Low-pressure die cast.

name: NMC cathode active material
components: Nickel-Manganese-Cobalt oxide cathode material (~50% secondary Ni, 100% secondary Co per BMW)
notes: Cathode is the single largest carbon contributor in the battery. BMW reduced Co to <10%.

name: Graphite anode material
components: Natural and synthetic graphite anode
notes: Synthetic graphite from petroleum coke is energy intensive.

name: Electrolyte (LiPF6)
components: Lithium hexafluorophosphate in organic solvent
notes: LiPF6 production is complex, fluorine chemistry.

name: Cell separator (PE/PP)
components: Polyethylene/polypropylene microporous separator film
notes: Ceramic coated for thermal safety.

name: Cell housing/packaging
components: Aluminum prismatic cell cans, bus bars, cell-level electronics
notes: Aluminum cans + nickel-plated steel.

name: Battery cell manufacturing energy
components: Electrode coating, calendering, electrolyte filling, formation cycling, aging, testing
notes: BMW requires green electricity for cell production. ~50-80 kWh per kWh of cells.

name: Battery pack housing/tray
components: Aluminum battery tray (structural, crash-protective), cooling plate, seals, fasteners (~30% secondary Al per BMW)
notes: BMW reports 30% secondary Al in housing.

name: Battery management system (BMS)
components: BMS master controller, cell supervision circuits (CSC), contactors, fuses, HV distribution
notes: Complex electronics. CSCs monitor individual cell voltages.

name: Battery thermal management
components: Cooling plate, thermal interface material, coolant channels, heat pump integration
notes: Integrated into pack floor. Critical for fast charging.

name: Electric motor (permanent magnet-free)
components: Front and rear motors — BMW 5th gen eDrive, no rare earth magnets, excited synchronous
notes: BMW specifically designed without permanent magnets (no NdFeB). Copper rotor windings.

name: Power electronics / inverter
components: Inverters (2), DC-DC converter, onboard charger, power distribution unit
notes: SiC MOSFETs, multilayer PCBs, aluminum heat sinks. Very high CO2/kg.

name: Single-speed reduction gear
components: Single-speed gearboxes (2) — integrated into motor housing
notes: Much simpler than ICE transmission. Steel gears, Al housing.

name: Copper wire and cable
components: HV cables, LV wiring harness, motor windings, charging cable
notes: More copper in EV than ICE due to motors + HV system.

name: Copper/brass fittings
components: Radiator fittings, electrical terminals, bus bars, connectors
notes: Brass/bronze for corrosion resistance.

name: Polypropylene (PP)
components: Bumper fascias, wheel arch liners, interior trim, HVAC ducts, under-body shields
notes: Most common polymer. Talc/glass filled variants.

name: Polyamide/Nylon (PA)
components: Structural brackets, radiator end tanks, cable ties, motor mount components
notes: PA6/PA66 glass-filled for structural.

name: ABS/PC blends
components: Dashboard components, center console, mirror housings, pillar trims, kidney grille surround
notes: High-gloss and textured.

name: Polyurethane foam (PU)
components: Seat cushions/backs, headrest foam, door padding, NVH foam, headliner foam
notes: Flexible PU for seats, rigid for insulation.

name: Polyethylene (PE)
components: Washer fluid reservoir, wire loom, vapor barriers
notes: HDPE/LDPE.

name: PBT/PET components
components: Electrical connectors, sensor housings, headlight reflectors, ECU housings
notes: Glass-filled PBT.

name: PMMA/Polycarbonate
components: Headlight lenses, tail light lenses, instrument cluster lens, interior light covers
notes: Optical-grade, UV-stabilized.

name: CFRP / composites
components: CFRP roof panel (BMW iX uses carbon fiber roof), structural reinforcements
notes: CF production is extremely energy intensive. Signature iX feature.

name: Tires
components: 4x tires (255/50R20 or similar) + repair kit
notes: ~12 kg each. Continental/Bridgestone publish data.

name: EPDM/rubber seals
components: Door seals, window seals, trunk seal, hood seal, HV battery seals, grommets
notes: EPDM vulcanized.

name: Rubber hoses
components: Coolant hoses, brake hoses, A/C hoses (no fuel hoses in EV)
notes: Multi-layer reinforced.

name: Vibration dampeners
components: Motor mounts, suspension bushings, subframe bushings
notes: Rubber bonded to steel.

name: Laminated windshield
components: Windshield with HUD projection layer, laminated PVB interlayer
notes: Large windshield. HUD adds complexity.

name: Tempered glass
components: Side windows, rear window, panoramic roof glass (large on iX)
notes: iX has large panoramic glass roof.

name: Synthetic textiles
components: Seat upholstery (vegan — BMW eliminating leather), door fabric, headliner, carpet, trunk lining
notes: BMW moving to 100% vegan interiors.

name: Carpet/floor covering
components: Molded floor carpet, floor mats, trunk carpet, NVH underlayment
notes: PET/PP tufted or needle-punched.

name: Automotive paint/coatings
components: E-coat, primer, basecoat, clearcoat, underbody coating
notes: 4-layer system. Dingolfing paint shop.

name: Structural adhesives
components: Body structural adhesives, battery pack sealing, windshield bonding, hem flange adhesive
notes: More adhesive in EV for battery sealing.

name: Coolant
components: Battery coolant, motor coolant, cabin HVAC coolant (multiple loops in EV)
notes: More coolant in EV than ICE — battery thermal management.

name: Brake fluid
components: DOT 4 brake fluid

name: Refrigerant (R-1234yf)
components: A/C + heat pump refrigerant charge
notes: Low GWP. Heat pump standard on iX.

name: Transmission/motor oil
components: Gearbox oil (2 gearboxes), grease
notes: Less oil than ICE — no engine oil changes.

name: Printed circuit boards
components: Domain controllers, ADAS ECU, iDrive computer, telematics, gateway, zone controllers
notes: BMW iX uses zonal electrical architecture.

name: Semiconductor chips
components: SoCs, MCUs, power MOSFETs, memory, ADAS processors, sensor ICs
notes: Extreme CO2/kg but tiny mass.

name: Display panels
components: 12.3-inch instrument display + 14.9-inch curved central display (iDrive 8)
notes: First BMW with curved display unit.

name: Sensors and actuators
components: Cameras (5+), ultrasonic sensors, radar, wheel speed, temp sensors, current sensors, accelerometers
notes: ADAS sensor suite. No LiDAR on current iX.

name: Small electric motors
components: Window motors (4), wiper motors, mirror motors, seat motors (8-12), HVAC blower, coolant pumps
notes: More pumps in EV for thermal management.

name: Wiring harness assemblies
components: HV harness, LV body harness, door harnesses, battery harness — heavier in EV
notes: HV cables add significant weight and copper.

name: Headlamp assemblies
components: Adaptive LED headlamps (2) with laser light option, DRL, slim design
notes: Complex: LED arrays, driver electronics, Al reflectors.

name: Tail/signal lamps
components: Full-width LED tail light bar, turn signals, side markers, license plate lights
notes: Distinctive full-width rear light bar on iX.

name: Heat exchangers
components: Battery chiller, motor/inverter cooler, cabin radiator, A/C condenser, A/C evaporator
notes: More heat exchangers in EV than ICE.

name: Heat pump system
components: Heat pump compressor, expansion valves, refrigerant circuits, blower assembly
notes: Standard on iX. Critical for winter range.

name: Brake friction materials
components: Front/rear brake pads — less wear in EV due to regen braking
notes: Ceramic or semi-metallic.

name: Brake calipers
components: Front fixed calipers, rear floating calipers
notes: Aluminum front, cast iron rear.

name: Electric power steering
components: EPS motor, rack, tie rods, steering column, steering wheel, sensors
notes: Rack-mounted EPS.

name: Shock absorbers / air suspension
components: Adaptive air suspension (standard on iX) — air springs, compressor, valve block, dampers
notes: Air suspension is heavier than coil springs.

name: Airbag systems
components: Front airbags (2), side airbags (2), curtain airbags (2), knee airbag, inflators, sensors
notes: Nylon bags, pyrotechnic inflators.

name: Seatbelt systems
components: 3-point belts (5), pretensioners, load limiters, retractors
notes: PET webbing, steel mechanisms.

name: Instrument panel
components: Dashboard, curved display housing, glovebox, defroster ducts, soft-touch surfaces
notes: iX minimalist design with crystal iDrive controller.

name: Door trim assemblies
components: Door panels (4), armrests, speaker grilles, map pockets, handles
notes: PP substrate, fabric/synthetic wrap, foam.

name: Seat structures
components: Front seat frames (2), rear seat frame, tracks, recliners, power motors, head restraints
notes: Steel frames, power adjustment.

name: Exterior mirrors
components: Side mirrors (2) — power fold, heat, auto-dim, camera, turn signal
notes: Glass, Al, plastic, motors, electronics.

name: Kidney grille assembly
components: BMW kidney grille — COVESTRO material, closed design with sensor integration
notes: THE CATENA-X DATA POINT. Real cradle-to-gate PCF via Catena-X certified exchange. Only component with primary facility data.

name: Charging inlet/port
components: CCS charging inlet, charge port door, HV charging cable (onboard)
notes: CCS Type 2 connector.

name: Antenna/connectivity
components: Shark fin antenna (GPS, 5G, WiFi, Bluetooth), telematics control unit, eSIM
notes: 5G connectivity on iX.

name: Rolling element bearings
components: Wheel hub bearings (4), motor bearings, steering bearings
notes: Bearing steel, precision ground.

name: Acoustic insulation
components: Firewall insulation, floor damping, door insulation, wheel well liners — extra NVH for EV quiet cabin
notes: EVs need more NVH since no engine noise masks road noise.

name: Filters
components: Cabin air filter (activated carbon), coolant filter — no engine air/oil/fuel filters in EV
notes: Fewer filters than ICE.

name: Audio system
components: Harman Kardon speakers (up to 18), amplifier, subwoofer
notes: Premium audio standard on iX.

name: Panoramic glass roof
components: Large panoramic glass panel, electrochromic dimming (Sky Lounge), guide rails
notes: Electrochromic glass is complex — polymer + liquid crystal layers.

name: 12V battery (AGM)
components: 12V AGM auxiliary battery
notes: Supports 12V systems. Smaller role in EV.

name: Cavity wax/corrosion protection
components: Cavity wax, underbody stone-chip coating, anti-corrosion treatment
notes: Applied at Dingolfing.
